title: thelypteris × boottii
intro: Thelypteris × boottii, a hybrid fern species, is a result of the cross between Thelypteris noveboracensis and Thelypteris pubescens. It is native to North America and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate health issues such as arthritis and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or capsules, which can be used to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
